calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-062 Phase 3-corrected monomodal-collapse falsifier on SD-054 (gated_policy in optimizer + phased training + divergence probe + hardened C3)
items.note: Phase 3 corrections per arc_062_rule_apprehension_plan.md decision-log 2026-05-10: (A) gated_policy.parameters() in dedicated Adam during P1; (B) phased training P0 encoder warmup -> P1 frozen encoder + scaffolding diversification loss -> P2 eval; (C) behavioral-divergence probe with mid-P1 inert-gating short-circuit at MID_TRAINING_EP=30 (TV<0.05); (D) hardened C3 with transit_rate floor 0.05 + np.nanmean. P1 training pressure is scaffolding (NOT REINFORCE on env reward); full REINFORCE deferred to Phase 3 GAP-C/D when discriminator wires into SD-033a.

items.title: MECH-313 (ARC-065) stochastic_noise_floor substrate-readiness diagnostic (UC1-UC5)
items.note: MECH-313 (ARC-065 child) substrate-readiness diagnostic. 5 sub-tests UC1-UC5 covering instantiation, master-OFF backward-compat, lift arithmetic correctness across alpha/min_temperature sweep, select_action wiring contract, and MECH-094 simulation gate. Pure-arithmetic regulator -- no learned parameters, no env loop required, ~5 min on any machine. Substrate landed 2026-05-10 alongside SD doc + 11 contract tests (all PASS) + this validation. Behavioural validation deferred to Q-045 4-arm ablation (MECH-313 vs MECH-260 collapse falsifier) on V3-EXQ-543b/c successors AFTER this substrate is in.
